LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF CON WAY TRANSPORTATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING THE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE, TO CORRECT IDENTITY OF DEFENDANT, AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DISMISSAL OF THE CASE DEPRIVED THE COURT OF JURISDICTION, AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FALLS OUTSIDE THE TIME LIMIT OF SECTION 473(B) FOR RELIEF FROM THAT DISMISSAL. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
